calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Chess Venture Spv, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Chic Incorporation, Inc. and Catherine Chow.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Michelle L. Covington, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chess Ventures SPV, LLC.
No appearance by defendants Chic Incorporation, Inc. and Catherine Chow.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on May 11, 2018, and personally served on defendants Chic Incorporation, Inc. and Catherine Chow on September 6, 2018.
Default as to defendants Chic Incorporation, Inc. and Catherine Chow was entered on November 14, 2018.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Peter Singh and DOES 1-10 was filed on February 13, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, August 15, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chess Ventures SPV, LLC, and against the default defendants Chic Incorporation, Inc. and Catherine Chow, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $150,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $17,656.56.
Attorney Fees - $12,245.00.
Costs - $1,245.57.

Total - $181,147.13.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff Chess Venture Spv, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Continued To Aug-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2019 Set For Case Management Conference On Oct-02-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Set For Trial On May-28-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
